creator: devnull@apt322.org
text:
Hi Andrew

Your premises are correct, but your conclusion may be wrong.

Sun is no longer a concern, yes, I strongly Agree. But although OpenZFS is currently an independent project, ZFS was developed by Sun, which at the time has several recommendations.

Today, we have no guarantee that the team responsible for OpenZFS has the same Sun recommendations. We do not know whether these recommendations have been reviewed by the OpenZFS team, so it would be wrong to state that "OpenZFS recommends...".

We know that Sun made certain recommendations, but we don't actually know whether those same recommendations were endorsed (or reviewed) by currently OpenZFS team.
